title: Add Goldsky deploy script to subgraph package.json
description: Add deploy:goldsky script to packages/subgraph/package.json that runs: goldsky subgraph deploy maci-platform-subgraph/v1 --path .

title: Update .env.example with Goldsky provider note
description: Update the NEXT_PUBLIC_MACI_SUBGRAPH_URL comment in packages/interface/.env.example to note Goldsky as a supported provider alongside The Graph and Alchemy.

title: Register test projects
description: Submit project proposals through the UI at /rounds/:roundId/proposals/new with test project data, then approve them as admin

title: Migrate subgraph deployment to Goldsky
description: Deploy the existing MACI Platform subgraph to Goldsky instead of The Graph Studio. Goldsky is API-compatible, so no frontend code changes needed - just deployment tooling and the endpoint URL.
close_reason: All subtasks complete - deploy script, env example, and README updated for Goldsky

title: Initialize the poll
description: Run initPoll to activate the poll so voters can sign up and projects can register
close_reason: Poll 1 initialized successfully on Optimism Sepolia

title: Register test voters and cast votes
description: Using FreeForAllGatekeeper, register test wallets as voters via /signup, then allocate and submit votes on test projects

title: Deploy poll on Optimism Sepolia
description: Run deploy-poll from packages/contracts to create a voting poll using the already-deployed MACI contracts (0x2ef2Ad675f77FaECf93BC327678Bd2722dc39089)
close_reason: Poll-1 deployed on Optimism Sepolia. Key addresses: Poll=0x1056672868943503c52aA46a4cD2C9D4b86d7e74, SimpleRegistry=0x84A90CE99F6fC5bE8985cEFE8CAdD16E604c9D72, Tally=0x3511853d6293cFb700562C58D46280Cd57840963. USDTor token deployed at 0xAA14253c1DFf90F69034c8cc6Cd0b620727dfa96

title: Deploy subgraph for Optimism Sepolia
description: Configure subgraph with MACI and RegistryManager addresses, build, and deploy to The Graph Studio
notes: Goldsky deployment option added (deploy:goldsky script). Can now deploy to Goldsky as alternative to The Graph Studio. See packages/subgraph/README.md for instructions.

title: Configure and deploy interface
description: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_MACI_ADDRESS, subgraph URL, chain config, timeline dates, and admin address in interface .env. Deploy to Vercel or run locally.

title: Add Goldsky deployment docs to subgraph README
description: Document the Goldsky deployment option in packages/subgraph/README.md including prerequisites (account, CLI install, auth) and deploy commands.
close_reason: Added Goldsky deployment section to subgraph README alongside The Graph and Alchemy
